text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes—the race that will
decide the junior champion.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I can only imagine how thrilled Grandfather would
be to see me here.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
When I was young, I could not control my
impulses and would even try to subjugate others
through force.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I mistook violence for strength, but my
grandfather set me on the right path before I had
a chance to stray too far.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Do not let those flames of yours burn you. You
must tame them and become their master.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
He was strict, stubborn, and annoying. But he was
equally kind, persevering, and warm. And he
never shied away from me either.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Grampa... You were the one who taught me how
to control my heart by leading me down the path
of a warrior.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And when that alone did not quell the fire within
me, you showed me the way of the racer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You gifted me the path that I now live by, and
that makes my heart dance.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
To pay back your kindness and to usher on my
growth, I shall now push forward on a new
journey.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I must ascertain which Umamusume will be a
worthy rival to walk down this path with.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I guess Ardan couldn't make it after all,
huh...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... A few days ago she said that she'd come
to watch the race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But her doctor won't let her, so she's resting at
home today...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ardan is an incredible racer! As a member of the
prestigious Mejiro family, she's bursting with skill
and talent!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Unfortunately, her body is quite weak...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Not every bud is meant to flower, I suppose...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Th-that's why I have to do my best!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is improving, including me, and the
secret to growing strong is to race! In other
words, "static can't shock you if you have gloves
on"!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Asahi Hai F.S., and I have to win it
no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maruzen won this race, after all. Plus...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Well... I'm not the type to let anyone take my
dream from me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I-I mean, I know there are probably other racers
who are just skilled as me, if not more... But well,
um...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I will! I'm going to pour my whole heart into this
race and bring the flower of victory to bloom!
